name: MyPoint Credit Union North Park
description_short: San Diego-based credit union offering checking, savings, certificates, auto loans, home equity lines of credit, and credit cards to local members.
description_long:
MyPoint Credit Union is a locally-focused financial institution serving the San Diego community with multiple branch locations, including a North Park branch. The credit union positions itself as a community-oriented alternative to traditional banks, emphasizing personal service and competitive rates for its members.

MyPoint offers a comprehensive suite of consumer banking products including high-yield checking accounts (up to 3.25% APY), savings accounts, certificates of deposit (currently advertising 3.00% APY on 18-month terms), auto loans (rates from 5.34% APR), home equity lines of credit, solar and green living loans (from 7.49% APR), and credit cards including the MyPoint Perks Visa (introductory 2.99% APR with no balance transfer fee). Members can access accounts through online banking, business online banking, mobile banking with biometric security, and in-person at physical branch locations.

The institution distinguishes itself through competitive rate offerings, mobile banking with advanced security features, and a stated commitment to personal service and member relationships. Customer testimonials highlight responsive staff and willingness to go "the extra mile." The credit union emphasizes its local San Diego roots and community involvement, positioning itself as an alternative to larger national banks.

MyPoint Credit Union is best suited for San Diego-area residents seeking competitive rates on standard banking products and personal loan services. However, as a traditional credit union, it does not offer specialized financial solutions like credit repair, debt settlement, credit building tools, or non-emergency financial assistance products. Members must meet eligibility requirements to join the credit union. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: High-yield checking up to 3.25% APY, significantly above typical bank offerings
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.34% APR
Introductory credit card rate of 2.99% APR with no balance transfer fees
Mobile banking with biometric security features including check deposit
Federal deposit insurance up to $250,000 per depositor through NCUSIF
Multiple San Diego branch locations for in-person service
Specialized loan products including solar/green living loans and home equity lines of credit
cons: Membership restricted to San Diego community; not available nationwide
No mention of overdraft protection or payday alternative loans (PALs) typical of credit unions
Limited information about minimum account balances, membership fees, or eligibility requirements
No specialized credit-building products like secured cards or credit builder loans mentioned
Website lacks details on business lending or commercial services beyond business online banking
best_for: San Diego-area residents seeking competitive rates on checking and savings accounts
Local auto borrowers looking for APR rates below typical bank offerings
Credit union members wanting personal relationship-based banking with responsive service
Homeowners in San Diego interested in home equity lines of credit or solar loan financing
diagnosis: MyPoint Credit Union is best for San Diego residents seeking traditional banking services with competitive rates and personalized service from a local credit union. The main caveat is geographic restriction—membership and services are limited to the San Diego area, and the institution does not offer specialized financial products like credit repair, debt management, or credit-building tools.
services: Certificates of deposit (Share Certificates and IRA Certificates)
Credit cards (MyPoint Perks Visa and Ultra Visa Card)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3773 30th St Ste G, San Diego, CA 92104
